<!-- Thanks for opening a PR.

Use a conventional title:
- feat(component): add new behavior
- fix(render): preserve attribute output
- docs(readme): clarify install steps
- chore(root): update tooling
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changed? -->

## Verification

<!-- Paste the commands you ran, for example: pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:e2e, pnpm build, pnpm lint. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or examples cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Types were checked without suppressions.
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in docs or examples.
